LibraryEffDetail.note: Deals physical damage. Physical damage is affected by the target's defense value.
Deals moderate physical damage. Physical damage is affected by the target's defense value.
Deals strong physical damage. Physical damage is affected by the target's defense value.
Deals very powerful physical damage. Physical damage is affected by the target's defense value.
Deals supreme physical damage. Physical damage is affected by the target's defense value.
Deals ultimate physical damage. Physical damage is affected by the target's defense value.
Deals fire damage. Fire damage is affected by the target's fire resistance value.
Deals moderate fire damage. Fire damage is affected by the target's fire resistance value.
Deals strong fire damage. Fire damage is affected by the target's fire resistance value.
Deals very powerful fire damage. Fire damage is affected by the target's fire resistance value.
Deals supreme fire damage. Fire damage is affected by the target's fire resistance value.
Deals ultimate fire damage. Fire damage is affected by the target's fire resistance value.
Deals ice damage. Ice damage is affected by the target's ice resistance value.
Deals moderate ice damage. Ice damage is affected by the target's ice resistance value.
Deals strong ice damage. Ice damage is affected by the target's ice resistance value.
Deals very powerful ice damage. Ice damage is affected by the target's ice resistance value.
Deals supreme ice damage. Ice damage is affected by the target's ice resistance value.
Deals ultimate ice damage. Ice damage is affected by the target's ice resistance value.
Deals lightning damage. Lightning damage is affected by the target's lightning resistance value.
Deals moderate lightning damage. Lightning damage is affected by the target's lightning resistance value.
Deals strong lightning damage. Lightning damage is affected by the target's lightning resistance value.
Deals very powerful lightning damage. Lightning damage is affected by the target's lightning resistance value.
Deals supreme lightning damage. Lightning damage is affected by the target's lightning resistance value.
Deals ultimate lightning damage. Lightning damage is affected by the target's lightning resistance value.
Deals magic damage. Magic damage is affected by the target's magic resistance value.
Deals strong magic damage. Magic damage is affected by the target's magic resistance value.
Deals very powerful magic damage. Magic damage is affected by the target's magic resistance value.
Deals supreme magic damage. Magic damage is affected by the target's magic resistance value.
Deals strong physical damage. Can also randomly cause a number of effects.
Deals very powerful physical damage. Can also randomly cause a number of effects.
Deals supreme non-attribute damage. This is not affected by any resistance. The damage increases according to how powerful the applied traits are.
Deals ultimate non-attribute damage. This is not affected by any resistance. The damage increases according to how powerful the applied traits are.
Uni rain from the sky, dealing physical damage to all enemies. Also activates 1 time card.
Puni rain from the sky, dealing magic damage to all enemies. Also activates 1 time card.
Meteors rain from the sky, dealing fire damage to all enemies. Also activates 1 time card.
??? rains from the sky, dealing physical damage to all enemies. Also activates 1 time card.
Stars rain from the sky, dealing physical damage to all enemies. Also activates 1 time card.
Bombs rain from the sky, dealing fire damage to all enemies. Also activates 1 time card.
Island Fish rain from the sky, dealing physical damage to all enemies. Also activates 1 time card.
Treasure chests rain from the sky, dealing magic damage to all enemies. Also activates 1 time card.
Summons an Ardra to deal physical damage, also delaying turn a little.
Summons a beast to deal physical damage. Physical damage is affected by the target's defense value.
Summons a Puni to deal physical damage. Physical damage is affected by the target's defense value.
Summons a ghost to deal magic damage. Magic damage is affected by the target's magic resistance value.
Summons a mandrake to deal magic damage. Has a chance to inflict Poison.
Summons a Lich to deal magic damage. Part of damage dealt is absorbed as HP.
Deals physical damage, and recover for half the damage dealt. This damage is affected by the target's defense value.
Deals strong physical damage, and recover for half the damage dealt. This damage is affected by the target's defense value.
Deals very powerful physical damage, and recover for half the damage dealt. This damage is affected by the target's defense value.
Deals moderate physical damage. Physical damage is affected by the target's defense value.
Deals moderate physical damage. Physical damage is affected by the target's defense value.
Deals physical damage. Physical damage is affected by the target's defense value.
Bursts to deal minor physical damage to the target. Its power is very small.
Explodes to deal physical damage to the target. Its power is small.
Sharp thorns inside burst out, dealing physical damage to the target. Its power is fairly high.
Thorns stick into the target, draining HP over time. The effect is very small.
Sharp thorns stick into the target, draining HP over time. The effect is small.
Piercing thorns stab into the target, draining HP over time. The effect is fairly big.
Deals fixed damage to the target, unaffected by defense. Its power is very small.
Deals fixed damage to the target, unaffected by defense. Its power is small.
Deals fixed damage to the target, unaffected by defense. Its power is big.
When the target's HP falls below a certain amount, they can be finished with one hit. This has no effect on certain enemies.
Burns deal continuous damage. The effect is fairly small.
Severe burns deal continuous damage. The effect is big.
Inextinguishable flames deal continuous damage. The effect is very big.
A vast level of unending heat deals continuous damage. The effect is supremely big.
Emits a hotter than usual flame, dealing a large amount of additional damage that ignores defense.
The attack area becomes single target, but deals ultimate additional damage that ignores defense.
Pushes the target's turn back a little. This effect diminishes with each use until they take another turn.
Pushes the target's turn back a decent amount. This effect diminishes with each use until they take another turn.
Pushes the target's turn back a considerable amount. This effect diminishes with each use until they take another turn.
Shocks the target with intense electricity, reducing their HP. The amount depends on the target's maximum HP.
Freezes the target with powerful cold, pushing back their turn. This effect diminishes with each use until they take another turn.
Freezes the target with very powerful cold, pushing back their turn. This effect diminishes with each use until they take another turn.
Calls a rain cloud, activating 1 time card that deals lightning damage to the target. The effect lasts 1 turn.
Calls a thunder cloud, activating 1 time card that deals lightning damage to the target. The effect lasts 2 turns.
Calls a tempest, activating 1 time card that deals lightning damage to the target. The effect lasts 3 turns.
Expands the item's area of effect a little.
Expands the item's area of effect.
Expands the item's area of effect by a lot.
Activates automatically when the user's HP falls below 20%.
Activates automatically when the user's HP falls below 30%.
Activates automatically when the user's HP falls below 40%.
Deals additional big fixed damage to the target.
The rain of fire spawns meteors, dealing big fixed additional damage to the target.
Has a high chance to inflict Poison on the target. The effect is very big. Poison deals damage on each turn.
Reduces all of the target's resistances by 1 level. Has no effect if the target has no resistances, and this cannot cause weaknesses.
Restores the target's HP by a slight amount.
Restores the target's HP by a small amount.
Restores the target's HP.
Restores the target's HP by a large amount.
Restores the target's HP by a huge amount.
Restores the target's HP by an extreme amount.
Restores the target's MP by a slight amount.
Restores the target's MP by a small amount.
Restores the target's MP.
Restores the target's MP by a large amount.
Restores the target's MP by a huge amount.
Restores the target's MP by an extreme amount.
Restores the target's LP by a slight amount.
Restores the target's LP by a small amount.
Restores the target's LP.
Restores the target's LP by a large amount.
Restores the target's LP by a huge amount.
Restores the target's LP by an extreme amount.
Restores a slight amount of the target's HP and MP.
Restores a small amount of the target's HP and MP.
Restores the target's HP and MP.
Restores a large amount of the target's HP and MP.
Restores a huge amount of the target's HP and MP.
Restores a slight amount of the target's HP and LP.
Restores a small amount of the target's HP and LP.
Restores the target's HP and LP.
Restores a large amount of the target's HP and LP.
Restores a huge amount of the target's HP and LP.
Restores a slight amount of the target's HP and LP.
Restores a small amount of the target's HP and LP.
Restores the target's HP and LP.
Restores a large amount of the target's HP and LP.
Restores a huge amount of the target's HP and LP.
Restores the whole party's HP by a slight amount.
Restores the whole party's HP by a small amount.
Restores the whole party's HP.
Restores a slight amount of the target's HP and LP. Recovery amount increases with higher maximum HP.
Restores a small amount of the target's HP and LP. Recovery amount increases with higher maximum HP.
Restores the target's HP and LP. Recovery amount increases with higher maximum HP.
Restores a large amount of the target's HP and LP. Recovery amount increases with higher maximum HP.
Restores a huge amount of the target's HP and LP. Recovery amount increases with higher maximum HP.
Restores an extreme amount of the target's HP and LP. Recovery amount increases with higher maximum HP.
Sits in the stomach, delaying your turn in battle a slight amount. Also restores LP.
Sits in the stomach, delaying your turn in battle a small amount. Also restores LP.
Sits in the stomach, delaying your turn in battle. Also restores LP.
It's so hard that it slows you down, inflicting Slow. The effect is moderate.
It's hard to digest, inflicting Slow. The effect is small.
This is digested so quickly that it doesn't affect the body.
It's so bad tasting that it causes pain, inflicting damage.
It's delicious, restoring a small amount of HP.
The target recovers from Sleep.
Reduces the wait time after the target's next turn by a small amount.
Restores a slight amount of the target's HP and LP.
Restores a small amount of the target's HP and LP.
Coldness slows down the body, reducing the target's speed a little.
Warms the body, increasing the target's speed a little.
Warms the body, increasing the target's speed a lot, but also deals continuous damage.
The sloppy texture makes you feel weird, reducing attack power a small amount.
The jiggly texture is quite pleasant. Increases the target's attack power a little.
The texture experienced for the first time excites you, increasing attack power a little. Also restores a small amount of the target's HP each turn.
The crumbly texture makes you feel weird, reducing defense a small amount.
The fluffy texture is quite pleasant. Increases the target's defense a little.
The unknown chewiness excites you, increasing defense a little. Also speeds up the target's turn a little.
The nutritious flavor increases all stats by a small amount.
The highly nourishing flavor increases all stats.
Restores the target's HP. Recovery amount increases the closer it is to 7am.
Restores the target's HP. Recovery amount increases the closer it is to 3pm.
Restores the target's HP. Recovery amount increases the closer it is to 10pm.
Grants the target a slight HP recovery bonus.
Grants the target a small HP recovery bonus.
Grants the target an HP recovery bonus.
Grants the target a large HP recovery bonus.
The target recovers a slight amount of Break value.
The target recovers a small amount of Break value.
The target recovers a decent amount of Break value.
The target recovers Break value.
The target recovers a large amount of Break value.
The target recovers a huge amount of Break value.
Revives the target from KO, and restores a slight amount of HP.
Revives the target from KO, and restores a small amount of HP.
Revives the target from KO, and restores a moderate amount of HP.
Revives the target from KO, and restores a large amount of HP.
Revives the target from KO, and restores a huge amount of HP.
The target recovers from Sleep.
The target recovers from Poison.
The target recovers from Slow.
The target recovers from Curse.
The target recovers from Blind.
The target recovers from Weak.
The target recovers from No Heal.
The target recovers from Seal.
The target recovers from revival After Effects.
The target recovers from 1 ailment.
The target recovers from 2 ailments.
Automatically revive on the next turn after being KO'd. Affects all allies, but HP after revival is low.
Automatically revive on the next turn after being KO'd. Affects all allies, but HP after revival is moderate.
Increases all of the target's stats by 20. The effect lasts for 5 turns.
Grants all allies fire resistance.
Grants all allies ice resistance.
Grants all allies lightning resistance.
Grants all allies fire, ice, and lightning resistance.
Temporarily reduces physical damage taken by the target. The effect is small.
Temporarily reduces physical damage taken by the target. The effect is fairly small.
Temporarily reduces physical damage taken by the target. The effect is decent.
Reduces the effectiveness of the next attack the target receives.
Greatly reduces the effectiveness of the next attack the target receives.
Massively reduces the effectiveness of the next attack the target receives.
Receive the goddess' protection, temporarily increasing the target's level a slight amount. Higher level increases attack and speed.
Receive the goddess' blessing, temporarily increasing the target's level a small amount. Higher level increases attack and speed.
Receive the heroic spirit's protection, temporarily increasing the target's level. Higher level increases attack and speed.
Receive the heroic spirit's blessing, temporarily increasing the target's level a large amount. Higher level increases attack and speed.
The heroic spirit descends, temporarily increasing the target's level a massive amount. Higher level increases attack and speed.
Deals damage to the target, but increases base damage on the next turn.
Deals large damage to the target, but greatly increases base damage on the next turn.
Deals huge damage to the target, but massively increases base damage on the next turn.
Item use count might not decrease when used. The chance is fairly low.
Item use count might not decrease when used. The chance is low.
Item use count might not decrease when used. The chance is high.
Item becomes a timed effect, allowing it to activate again. Effect lasts 1 turn.
Item becomes a timed effect, allowing it to activate again. Effect lasts 2 turns.
Item becomes a timed effect, allowing it to activate again. Effect lasts 3 turns.
Activates automatically when the user's HP falls below 20%.
Activates automatically when the user's HP falls below 30%.
Activates automatically when the user's HP falls below 50%.
Increases the target's attack power a little. The effect lasts 5 turns.
Increases the target's attack power. The effect lasts 5 turns.
Increases the target's attack power by a lot. The effect lasts 5 turns.
Increases the target's defense a little. The effect lasts 5 turns.
Increases the target's defense. The effect lasts 5 turns.
Increases the target's defense by a lot. The effect lasts 5 turns.
Increases the target's speed a little. The effect lasts 5 turns.
Increases the target's speed. The effect lasts 5 turns.
Increases the target's speed by a lot. The effect lasts 5 turns.
Increases all the target's stats a little. The effect lasts 5 turns.
Increases all the target's stats. The effect lasts 5 turns.
Increases all the target's stats by a lot. The effect lasts 5 turns.
Increases the target's hit rate a little. The effect lasts 5 turns.
Increases the target's hit rate. The effect lasts 5 turns.
Increases the target's hit rate by a lot. The effect lasts 5 turns.
Increases the target's evasion rate a little. The effect lasts 5 turns.
Increases the target's evasion rate. The effect lasts 5 turns.
Increases the target's evasion rate by a lot. The effect lasts 5 turns.
Increases the target's chance to score a critical hit by a small amount.
Increases the target's chance to score a critical hit by a decent amount.
Increases the target's chance to score a critical hit by a large amount.
Increases the target's critical hit damage bonus by a small amount.
Increases the target's critical hit damage bonus by a decent amount.
Increases the target's critical hit damage bonus by a large amount.
The target recovers a slight amount of HP on each turn. The effect lasts for 5 turns.
The target recovers a small amount of HP on each turn. The effect lasts for 5 turns.
The target recovers HP on each turn. The effect lasts for 5 turns.
The target recovers a large amount of HP on each turn. The effect lasts for 5 turns.
The target recovers a huge amount of HP on each turn. The effect lasts for 5 turns.
The target recovers an extreme amount of HP on each turn. The effect lasts for 5 turns.
Temporarily increases the target's maximum HP in battle. The effect is small.
Temporarily increases the target's maximum HP in battle. The effect is moderate.
Temporarily increases the target's maximum HP in battle. The effect is large.
Automatically revive on the next turn after being KO'd. HP after revival is low.
Automatically revive on the next turn after being KO'd. HP after revival is moderate.
Automatically revive on the next turn after being KO'd. HP after revival is fairly high.
Reduces the effectiveness of status ailments by a little.
Reduces the effectiveness of status ailments by a fair amount.
Reduces the effectiveness of status ailments by a good amount.
Reduces wait time after the target's next turn by a little.
Reduces wait time after the target's next turn by a fair bit.
Reduces wait time after the target's next turn by a good amount.
Increases the target's chance to activate a chain attack by 25%. Effect lasts 5 turns.
Increases the target's chance to activate a chain attack by 50%. Effect lasts 5 turns.
Increases the target's chance to activate a chain attack by 75%. Effect lasts 5 turns.
Increases damage dealt to Broken enemies by 25%. Effect lasts 5 turns.
Increases damage dealt to Broken enemies by 35%. Effect lasts 5 turns.
Increases damage dealt to Broken enemies by 50%. Effect lasts 5 turns.
Has a set chance of causing Poison, Blind, and Weak on the target.
Pushes the target's turn back a little. This effect diminishes with each use until they take another turn.
Pushes the target's turn back a decent amount. This effect diminishes with each use until they take another turn.
Pushes the target's turn back a considerable amount. This effect diminishes with each use until they take another turn.
Reduces the target's attack by a small amount, and temporarily increases your own by that amount.
Reduces the target's attack, and temporarily increases your own by that amount.
Reduces the target's attack by a large amount, and temporarily increases your own by that amount.
Reduces the target's defense by a small amount, and temporarily increases your own by that amount.
Reduces the target's defense, and temporarily increases your own by that amount.
Reduces the target's defense by a large amount, and temporarily increases your own by that amount.
Reduces the target's speed by a small amount, and temporarily increases your own by that amount.
Reduces the target's speed, and temporarily increases your own by that amount.
Reduces the target's speed by a large amount, and temporarily increases your own by that amount.
Nullifies 1 enhancement effect on the target.
Nullifies 2 enhancement effects on the target.
Nullifies 3 enhancement effects on the target.
Slightly reduces the target's attack power.
Reduces the target's attack power.
Greatly reduces the target's attack power.
Slightly reduces the target's defense.
Reduces the target's defense.
Greatly reduces the target's defense.
Slightly reduces the target's speed.
Reduces the target's speed.
Greatly reduces the target's speed.
Slightly reduces all of the target's stats.
Reduces all of the target's stats.
Greatly reduces all of the target's stats.
Has a low chance of Sleeping the target. Sleep renders the target unable to act on their turn.
Has a moderate chance of Sleeping the target. Sleep renders the target unable to act on their turn.
Has a high chance of Sleeping the target. Sleep renders the target unable to act on their turn.
Has a low chance of Poisoning the target. The effect is small. Poison deals damage every time the target takes a turn.
Has a moderate chance of Poisoning the target. The effect is moderate. Poison deals damage every time the target takes a turn.
Has a high chance of Poisoning the target. The effect is big. Poison deals damage every time the target takes a turn.
Has a low chance of Slowing the target. The effect is small. Slow increases wait time after taking a turn.
Has a moderate chance of Slowing the target. The effect is moderate. Slow increases wait time after taking a turn.
Has a high chance of Slowing the target. The effect is big. Slow increases wait time after taking a turn.
Has a low chance of Cursing the target. The effect is small. Curse causes the target to take damage when healing.
Has a moderate chance of Cursing the target. The effect is moderate. Curse causes the target to take damage when healing.
Has a high chance of Cursing the target. The effect is big. Curse causes the target to take damage when healing.
Has a low chance of Blinding the target. The effect is small. Blind reduces attack hit rate and evasion rate.
Has a moderate chance of Blinding the target. The effect is moderate. Blind reduces attack hit rate and evasion rate.
Has a high chance of Blinding the target. The effect is big. Blind reduces attack hit rate and evasion rate.
Has a low chance of Weakening the target. The effect is small. Weak reduces the power of all skills.
Has a moderate chance of Weakening the target. The effect is moderate. Weak reduces the power of all skills.
Has a high chance of Weakening the target. The effect is big. Weak reduces the power of all skills.
Has a low chance of No Healing the target. No Heal causes all recovery effects to heal for 0.
Has a moderate chance of No Healing the target. No Heal causes all recovery effects to heal for 0.
Has a high chance of No Healing the target. No Heal causes all recovery effects to heal for 0.
Has a low chance of Sealing the target. Seal renders the target unable to use powerful attacks.
Has a moderate chance of Sealing the target. Seal renders the target unable to use powerful attacks.
Has a high chance of Sealing the target. Seal renders the target unable to use powerful attacks.
Inflicts 3 random status effects on the target. The chance and effect are both low.
Inflicts 3 random status effects on the target. The chance and effect are both moderate.
Inflicts 3 random status effects on the target. The chance and effect are both high.
Reduces all of the target's resistances by 1 level. Has no effect if the target has no resistances, and this cannot cause weaknesses.
Reduces the target's fire resistance by 1 level. Has no effect if the target has no resistance, and this cannot cause weaknesses.
Reduces the target's ice resistance by 1 level. Has no effect if the target has no resistance, and this cannot cause weaknesses.
Reduces the target's lightning resistance by 1 level. Has no effect if the target has no resistance, and this cannot cause weaknesses.
Reduces the target's level a little. Reduced level decreases all stats and damage dealt.
Reduces the target's level. Reduced level decreases all stats and damage dealt.
Reduces the target's level a lot. Reduced level decreases all stats and damage dealt.
Deals continuous damage to the target. The effect is small, and the time is short.
Deals continuous damage to the target. The effect is moderate, and the time is short.
Deals continuous damage to the target. The effect is big, but the time is short.
Decreases the target's critical hit rate.
Increases the effectiveness of status ailments on the target. It does not increase the chances of ailments occurring.
Increases damage dealt to the target by a fixed ratio. It cannot be stacked, so only the highest effect will apply.
Increases Break effect dealt to the target. If multiple targets are hit, the effect is split.
Greatly increases Break effect dealt to the target. If multiple targets are hit, the effect is split.
Massively increases Break effect dealt to the target. If multiple targets are hit, the effect is split.
Ridiculously increases Break effect dealt to the target. If multiple targets are hit, the effect is split.
Reduces the rate at which enemies use powerful attacks a little.
Reduces the rate at which enemies use powerful attacks.
Reduces the rate at which enemies use powerful attacks a lot.
Pacifies the enemy, delaying the activation of powerful attacks by a little.
Pacifies the enemy, delaying the activation of powerful attacks by fair bit.
Pacifies the enemy, delaying the activation of powerful attacks.
Consumes a slight amount of HP. The amount is influenced by maximum HP.
Consumes a small amount of HP. The amount is influenced by maximum HP.
Consumes HP. The amount is influenced by maximum HP.
Consumes a large amount of HP. The amount is influenced by maximum HP.
Consumes a huge amount of HP. The amount is influenced by maximum HP.
Consumes a slight amount of MP. The effect is weakened when MP is insufficient.
Consumes a small amount of MP. The effect is weakened when MP is insufficient.
Consumes MP. The effect is weakened when MP is insufficient.
Consumes a large amount of MP. The effect is weakened when MP is insufficient.
Consumes a huge amount of MP. The effect is weakened when MP is insufficient.
Increases the chances of finding better materials in the field.
Greatly increases the chances of finding better materials in the field.
Rest for 5 hours, restoring 50% of HP, MP, and LP.
Rest for 10 hours, restoring all HP, MP, and LP.
Rest until dusk, restoring HP, MP, and LP. The amount restored depends on how long you rested.
Rest until night, restoring HP, MP, and LP. The amount restored depends on how long you rested.
Upon use, you will be instantly returned to the atelier.
Allows you to select a few items that you gathered, and send them back to the atelier. You can send up to 10 at a time.
Allows you to select items that you gathered, and send them back to the atelier. You can send up to 30 at a time.
Allows you to select many items that you gathered, and send them back to the atelier. You can send up to 50 at a time.
Hide your presence, making it hard for monsters to notice you for a short time.
Erase your presence, making it impossible for monsters to see you for a short time. Just don't get too close.
Reduces the chance of incidents by a small amount.
Reduces the chance of incidents.
Reduces the chance of incidents by a large amount.
You can avoid fighting monsters encountered on the World Map. This will consume the use count.
You can avoid fighting monsters encountered on the World Map. This will consume the use count.
You can avoid fighting monsters encountered on the World Map. This will consume the use count.
Reduces LP consumed while moving on the World Map by 25%.
Reduces LP consumed while moving on the World Map by half.
Reduces LP consumed while moving on the World Map to 0.
Move speed increases by 10%.
Move speed increases by 20%.
Move speed increases by 30%.
Increases item capacity by 20.
Increases item capacity by 40.
Reduces items lost by party wipe a little.
Reduces items lost by party wipe.
Reduces items lost by party wipe a lot.
Increases number of items gathered each time a little.
Increases number of items gathered each time.
Increases number of items gathered each time a lot.
Increases money gained from battle a little. Has no effect when money obtained is 0.
Increases money gained from battle. Has no effect when money obtained is 0.
Increases money gained from battle by a lot. Allows you to gain some money even when amount obtained is 0.
Increases experience points gained from battle a little.
Increases experience points gained from battle.
Increases experience points gained from battle by a lot.
Increases friend points gained when giving presents a little.
Increases friend points gained when giving presents.
Increases friend points gained when giving presents by a lot.
Makes it easier for gathering level and enemy level to increase.
Makes it harder for gathering level and enemy level to increase.
During battle, stats increase with each turn. There is a limit to this increase.
Stats are temporarily increased in battle, but the boost decreases with each turn.
Increases critical hit rate a little.
Increases critical hit rate and critical hit damage bonus a little.
Increases critical hit rate and critical hit damage bonus.
Increases effect of all Assist actions by a little.
Increases effect of all Assist actions.
Increases effect of all Assist actions by a lot.
Reduces the number of turns status ailments last by a small amount.
Reduces the number of turns status ailments last by a large amount.
Become a little less likely to be targeted during battle.
Become less likely to be targeted during battle.
Become a little more likely to be targeted during battle.
Become more likely to be targeted during battle.
Reduces wait time after all actions by a small amount.
Reduces wait time after all actions.
Reduces wait time after all actions by a large amount.
Increases chain attack chance by a small amount.
Increases chain attack chance.
Increases chain attack chance by a large amount.
Increases chain attack chance by a huge amount.
Swaps 50% of maximum HP and MP values with each other.
Completely swaps maximum HP and MP values.
Reduces damage taken by 10%, and converts it into MP damage.
Reduces damage taken by 10%, but delays turn.
Reduces damage taken by 10%, but increases Break value.
Increases the chance of higher expected values a little when attacking.
Increases the chance of higher expected values when attacking.
Increases the chance of higher expected values a lot when attacking.
Increases attack skill power by an amount depending on wait time after use.
Increases attack, defense, and speed by 20% of base maximum HP.
Increases attack, defense, and speed by 25% of base maximum MP.
Increases critical hit rate, evasion rate, and other values when below 25% HP.
Automatically revive on turn when KO'd in battle. HP after revival is low.
Automatically revive on turn when KO'd in battle. HP after revival is decent.
Automatically revive on turn when KO'd in battle. HP after revival is about half.
Reduces turn delaying effects.
Halves turn delaying effects.
Increases attack, defense, and speed by 15% in the morning. No effect during other times.
Increases attack, defense, and speed by 15% during the day. No effect during other times.
Increases attack, defense, and speed by 15% in the evening. No effect during other times.
Increases attack, defense, and speed by 15% at night. No effect during other times.
Increases attack, defense, and speed by 15% in the morning and day. No effect during evening or night.
Increases attack, defense, and speed by 15% in the evening and night. No effect during morning or day.
Reduces attack by 15%, increasing defense by that amount.
Reduces defense by 15%, increasing attack by that amount.
Recover a small amount of HP when recovering HP or removing ailments.
Removes 2 status ailments when HP is recovered.
Recover HP when recovering HP or removing ailments.
During battle, 10% of damage taken and MP consumed is absorbed into the other pool.
During battle, 15% of damage taken and MP consumed is absorbed into the other pool.
Temporarily increases attack, defense, and speed when ailments are removed.
Greatly increases attack, defense, and speed when ailments are removed.
The hidden magic of the Power Rune increases attack power by 15.
The hidden magic of the Defense Rune increases defense by 15.
The hidden magic of the Speed Rune increases speed by 15.
The hidden magic of the Herculean Rune increases attack by 25.
The hidden magic of the Guardian Rune increases defense by 25.
The hidden magic of the Swift Gale Rune increases speed by 25.
The hidden magic of the Weapon Rune increases base damage.
The hidden magic of the Tool Rune increases item power and reduces wait time.
The hidden magic of the Bulwark Rune reduces all damage taken.
Reduces speed by 15%, increasing attack by that amount.
The power of spirits increases base damage.
The power of the spirit king greatly increases base damage.
The power of the spirit god massively increases base damage.
Increases attack, defense, and speed. Increase grows with the wearer's level.
Increases attack, defense, and speed. Increase doubles with the wearer's level.
Find paths to escape, massively increasing the success rate of "Run".
Inner fighting spirit burns bright, revealing true power when fighting stronger enemies.
Gain the heroic soul, revealing true power when fighting powerful foes.
HP recovers a small amount on each turn.
HP recovers a decent amount on each turn.
HP recovers on each turn.
HP recovers a large amount on each turn.
MP recovers a small amount on each turn.
MP recovers a decent amount on each turn.
MP recovers on each turn.
MP recovers a large amount on each turn.
Increases maximum HP by 10.
Increases maximum HP by 15.
Increases maximum HP by 20.
Increases maximum HP by 25.
Increases maximum HP by 30.
Increases maximum MP by 10.
Increases maximum MP by 15.
Increases maximum MP by 20.
Increases maximum MP by 25.
Increases maximum MP by 30.
Increases attack power by 5.
Increases attack power by 10.
Increases attack power by 15.
Increases attack power by 20.
Increases attack power by 25.
Increases defense by 5.
Increases defense by 10.
Increases defense by 15.
Increases defense by 20.
Increases defense by 25.
Increases speed by 5.
Increases speed by 10.
Increases speed by 15.
Increases speed by 20.
Increases speed by 25.
Increases hit rate by 10%.
Increases hit rate by 15%.
Increases hit rate by 20%.
Increases hit rate by 25%.
Increases hit rate by 30%.
Increases evasion rate by 4%.
Increases evasion rate by 6%.
Increases evasion rate by 8%.
Increases evasion rate by 10%.
Increases evasion rate by 12%.
Increases critical hit rate by 3%.
Increases critical hit rate by 6%.
Increases critical hit rate by 9%.
Increases critical hit rate by 12%.
Increases critical hit rate by 15%.
Increases critical damage bonus by 3%.
Increases critical damage bonus by 6%.
Increases critical damage bonus by 9%.
Increases critical damage bonus by 12%.
Increases critical damage bonus by 15%.
Increases skill power by 5%.
Increases skill power by 7%.
Increases skill power by 10%.
Increases skill power by 15%.
Increases item power by 10%.
Increases item power by 15%.
Increases item power by 20%.
Reduces wait time after using item by 10%.
Reduces wait time after using item by 15%.
Reduces wait time after using item by 20%.
Increases Burst Gauge fill rate by 1%.
Increases Burst Gauge fill rate by 2%.
Increases Burst Gauge fill rate by 3%.
Immunity to Sleep ailment.
Immunity to Poison ailment.
Immunity to Slow ailment.
Immunity to Curse ailment.
Immunity to Blind ailment.
Immunity to Weak ailment.
Immunity to No Heal ailment.
Immunity to Seal ailment.
Immunity to revival After Effects ailment.
Immunity to One Hit KO.
Immunity to all ailments.
Reduces chance of being affected by ailments by a slight amount.
Reduces chance of being affected by ailments by a small amount.
Reduces chance of being affected by ailments by a fair amount.
Reduces chance of being affected by ailments by a decent amount.
Reduces chance of being affected by ailments.
You have a chance to survive with 1 HP when you receive damage that would reduce your HP to 0. Has a very low chance to work.
You have a chance to survive with 1 HP when you receive damage that would reduce your HP to 0. Has a low chance to work.
You have a chance to survive with 1 HP when you receive damage that would reduce your HP to 0. Has a fairly low chance to work.
You have a chance to survive with 1 HP when you receive damage that would reduce your HP to 0. Has a moderate chance to work.
You have a chance to survive with 1 HP when you receive damage that would reduce your HP to 0. Has a high chance to work.
Gain fire resistance.
Gain ice resistance.
Gain lightning resistance.
Absorbs a portion of damage dealt to the target as HP. The effect is small.
Absorbs a portion of damage dealt to the target as HP. The effect is fairly small.
Absorbs a portion of damage dealt to the target as HP. The effect is decent.
Absorbs a portion of damage dealt to the target as HP. The effect is large.
Reduces damage taken by 5%.
Reduces damage taken by 6%.
Reduces damage taken by 8%.
Reduces damage taken by 10%.
Increases Break value when attacking enemies by a slight amount.
Increases Break value when attacking enemies by a small amount.
Increases Break value when attacking enemies.
Increases Break value when attacking enemies by a large amount.
Increases Break resistance by a small amount.
Increases Break resistance by a decent amount.
Increases Break resistance.
Increases damage dealt to Broken enemies by a slight amount.
Increases damage dealt to Broken enemies by a small amount.
Increases damage dealt to Broken enemies.
Increases damage dealt to Broken enemies by a large amount.
The color of panels in the cauldron changes each day. Cycles <CLGR>red → blue → green → yellow → white → red<CLNR>.
Plachta appears on the right instead of Sophie during Synthesis.
This cauldron has "Synergy", "Tuning", "Time Limit", and "Color Surroundings" effects.
Synthesis has a 20 second time limit. Completing Synthesis during this time grants large bonuses.
The Synthesis panel display is level 1. Higher display level increases bonus placement at the start of Synthesis.
The Synthesis panel display is level 2. Higher display level increases bonus placement at the start of Synthesis.
The Synthesis panel display is level 3. Higher display level increases bonus placement at the start of Synthesis.
The Synthesis panel display is level 3. Higher display level increases Synthesis bonuses on panels.
The panel size is 4x4.
The panel size is 5x5.
The panel size is 6x6.
The cauldron Sophie inherited from her grandmother. It was used for a long time, so it only has minimal power left.
Performing Synthesis at quality value 0 won't result in failure, and produce the desired item.
A practice cauldron for alchemists in training. Since it's for practice, it only has basic functions.
Obtaining bonuses that are the same color as the liquid in the cauldron increases effect by 50%.
Obtaining bonuses that are the same color as materials already placed causes those materials to gain the same bonus.
60 second time limit. Exceeding this time will result in <CLGR>failure<CLNR>. Countdown begins after selecting materials and you cannot reselect the cauldron
When a material is placed, the Synthesis bonuses in all 8 directions around it become the same color.
Increases alchemy experience points by the ratio of the most common synthesis panel color upon item completion.
Increases item quality by the ratio of the most common synthesis panel color.
The ultimate alchemy cauldron, featuring all effects other than "Time Limit".
When placing materials, you can press <IM11><IM16> to flip it vertically.
When placing materials, you can press <IM11><IM16> to flip it horizontally.
When placing materials, you can press <IM11><IM16> to rotate it.
Changes the item color to <CLGR>Red<CLNR>.
Changes the item color to <CLGR>Blue<CLNR>.
Changes the item color to <CLGR>Green<CLNR>.
Changes the item color to <CLGR>Yellow<CLNR>.
Changes the item color to <CLGR>White<CLNR>.
Adds 10 category value to <CLGR>(Ingredient)<CLNR>.
Adds 10 category value to <CLGR>(Fuel)<CLNR>.
Adds 10 category value to <CLGR>(Medicine Mat)<CLNR>.
Adds 10 category value to <CLGR>(Poison Mat)<CLNR>.
Increases <CLGR>(Ingredient)<CLNR> category value by 5.
Increases <CLGR>(Gunpowder)<CLNR> category value by 5.
Increases <CLGR>(Wood)<CLNR> category value by 5.
Increases <CLGR>(Neutralizer)<CLNR> category value by 5.
Gain ultimate destruction. Increases critical hit damage bonus by 30%.
Gain ultimate stability. Nullifies turn delaying effects by 100%.
Gain ultimate reversal. 15% of damage taken is converted into MP damage and reduced.
Gain ultimate mobility. Wait time after using skills is reduced by 20%.
Gain ultimate regeneration. Recover 50 HP on every turn.
Gain ultimate criticality. Increases critical hit rate by 50%.
Gain ultimate conversion. 20% of damage taken is absorbed into MP.
Gain ultimate evolution. Greatly enhances stats of the wearer depending on level.
Gain ultimate vitality. Increases maximum HP by 100.
Gain ultimate mentality. Increases maximum MP by 100.
Gain ultimate enhancement. Increases maximum HP and MP by 50.
Gain ultimate attack power. Increases attack power by 50.
Gain ultimate defense. Increases defense by 50.
Gain ultimate energy. Increases speed by 50.
Gain ultimate accuracy. Increases hit rate by 50%.
Gain ultimate evasion. Increases evasion rate by 15%.
Gain ultimate fire resistance. Gain super fire resistance.
Gain ultimate ice resistance. Gain super ice resistance.
Gain ultimate lightning resistance. Gain super lightning resistance.
Gain ultimate resistance. Gain resistance to all status ailments.
Gain ultimate support. Enhances Assist action effects by 15%.
Gain ultimate compensation. Increases skill power by 30%.
Gain ultimate growth. Greatly increases expected damage value.
Gain ultimate revival. Automatically revive on your next turn after being KO'd.
Gain ultimate turn-around. Greatly increases stats when fighting powerful enemies.
Gain ultimate explosive force. Increases damage bonus by 15% during Burst.
Gain ultimate invulnerability. You have a 35% chance to survive with 1 HP when taking damage that would KO you.
Gain ultimate reduction. You have a 35% chance after a turn to reduce wait time by 25%.
Gain ultimate mitigation. Reduces all damage taken by 10%.
Gain ultimate zeal. Increases Burst Gauge refill rate by 10% when attacking.
Gain ultimate stunning force. Greatly increases Break value when attacking.
Gain ultimate opposition. Increases damage dealt and reduces damage taken when fighting powerful enemies.
